2603.28066.title: Synonymix: Unified Group Personas for Generative Simulations
2603.28066.paper_summary: Generative agent simulations operate at two scales: individual personas for character interaction, and population models for collective behavior analysis and intervention testing. We propose a third scale: meso-level simulation - interaction with group-level representations that retain grounding in rich individual experience. To enable this, we present Synonymix, a pipeline that constructs a "unigraph" from multiple life story personas via graph-based abstraction and merging, producing a queryable collective representation that can be explored for sensemaking or sampled for synthetic persona generation. Evaluating synthetic agents on General Social Survey items, we demonstrate behavioral signal preservation beyond demographic baselines (p<0.001, r=0.59) with demonstrable privacy guarantee (max source contribution <13%). We invite discussion on interaction modalities enabled by meso-level simulations, and whether "high-fidelity" personas can ever capture the texture of lived experience.
2603.28066.paper_summary_zh: 生成代理模擬在兩個層面上運作：個別角色的互動，以及用於集體行為分析和干預測試的人口模型。<lb/>我們提出第三個層面：中層模擬 - 與保留豐富個人經驗基礎的群體級表徵互動。<lb/>為了實現這一點，我們呈現了Synonymix，一個通過基於圖的抽象和合併從多個生活故事角色構建“單一圖”的流程，產生可查詢的集體表徵，供進行意義建構或用於合成角色生成的取樣。<lb/>在對一般社會調查項目進行的合成代理評估中，我們展示了行為信號在超越人口基線的情況下的保留（p<0.001, r=0.59），並具有可證明的隱私保障（最大來源貢獻<13%）。<lb/>我們邀請討論中層模擬所啟用的互動方式，以及“高保真”角色是否能夠捕捉到生活經驗的質感。
2603.28066.author: Huanxing Chen et.al.
